{{Quote|When you need a ship, or you want to get rid of a ship, and you don't want to leave a ... trail ... you come here.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="The Paradise Snare">''[[The Paradise Snare]]''</ref>}}
'''Toryl''', also known as '''Truthful Toryl''', was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] merchant. He owned and operated [[Truthful Toryl's Used Spaceship Lot]] on the planet [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]], in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. "Used" was actually a euphemism for "stolen," and Toryl was well known among criminal elements as the sentient to see in order to buy or sell a ship without being noticed by the authorities.

In [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] sold the yacht [[Talisman (starship)|''Talisman'']] to Toryl. However, the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] were searching for the yacht, and Toryl had to scrap it to avoid unwanted attention.

[[5 BBY/Legends|Five years later]], Han returned to Toryl looking for work with [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. Toryl provided him with a smuggling job to [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] smuggling components used to place weapons on starships.

==Behind the scenes==
"Toryl" was misspelled "Toryn" in ''[[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Duros]]''.
